remember: Students will be able to recall the major changes that occurred in the countryside as a result of colonial rule.
Students will be able to identify the different types of revenue systems implemented by the British in India.
Students will be able to describe the impact of colonial rule on the Indian peasantry.
understand: Students will be able to explain the reasons behind the introduction of new revenue systems by the British in India.
Students will be able to understand the effects of the commercialization of agriculture on the Indian countryside.
Students will be able to distinguish between the different types of peasant movements that emerged during the colonial period.
apply: Students will be able to apply their knowledge of colonial revenue systems to analyze the impact of these systems on the Indian economy.
Students will be able to use their understanding of peasant movements to evaluate the role of these movements in the Indian freedom struggle.
Students will be able to apply their knowledge of the commercialization of agriculture to explain the changes that occurred in the Indian countryside during the colonial period.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the relationship between colonial rule and the transformation of the Indian countryside.
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of colonial rule on the social and economic structures of the Indian village.
Students will be able to compare and contrast the different types of revenue systems implemented by the British in India and their effects on the Indian peasantry.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1, to understand the major changes that occurred in the countryside as a result of colonial rule.
To analyze the impact of colonial rule on the Indian peasantry and the emergence of peasant movements.
To evaluate the effects of the commercialization of agriculture on the Indian countryside.
board_exam_objectives: To answer questions on the major changes that occurred in the countryside as a result of colonial rule.
To explain the impact of colonial rule on the Indian peasantry and the emergence of peasant movements.
To analyze the effects of the commercialization of agriculture on the Indian countryside and the role of peasant movements in the Indian freedom struggle.
